content:
For Years, Inheritance Felt Like The Enterprise Solution

4 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Early Angular applications often looked like this:
CustomerComponent
│
▼
BaseCustomerComponent
│
▼
BaseFeatureComponent
│
▼
BaseComponentThe architecture felt organized.
Logic was shared.
Duplication disappeared.
Developers felt productive.
Inheritance became a default solution.
Especially in enterprise projects.
The Promise Of Inheritance
Inheritance offers a simple idea:
Write behavior once.
Reuse it everywhere.
Example:
export class CustomerComponent
extends BaseComponentInstantly:

• Utility methods appear

• Lifecycle behavior appears

• Shared functionality appears
The component gains capabilities without writing additional code.
